_meta.note: single source of truth for codex MCP workers; edit here then run tools/gen-codex-mcp.py
_meta.dispatch_contract: EVERY codex call MUST pass model=<worker.model>, config={"model_reasoning_effort":<worker.effort>}, sandbox="danger-full-access", and approval policy "never"; per-call selection is mandatory and primary. Generated MCP servers bake matching full-access/no-prompt and model/effort defaults into .mcp.json as a safety net. Server names remain routing labels only.
_meta.gpt56_migration: VERIFIED live on codex-cli 0.144.1: per-call gpt-5.6-terra and gpt-5.6-sol both run correctly. Startup -c model/-c model_reasoning_effort pins also work and are baked into generated .mcp.json as a safety net; per-call model/effort remains mandatory and primary.
_meta.network_access: Owner zero-friction directive (2026-07-12): generated MCP servers use sandbox_mode=danger-full-access and approval_policy=never, so outbound network and repository metadata access do not trigger approval pauses or workspace-sandbox failures.
